Scott Fitzgerald’s masterpiece is spoken aloud and brought to life by a cast of 13 in a setting you’d never expect.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eThis is not an adaptation, but rather the whole novel itself, staged in full, and hailed by \u003cem\u003eThe New York Times\u003c/em\u003e as “the most remarkable achievement in theatre not only of this year but also of this decade.”\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp\u003eIt’s an immersive literary experience that has captivated audiences worldwide, from New York to Abu Dhabi to Oslo.
